info.title: Finance Portfolio Backend API
info.description: API documentation for the Finance Portfolio Backend application.

tags.name: UserWatchlistController
tags.description: Watchlist / Favorites api for frontend dashboard

tags.name: Portfolio Overview APIs
tags.description: Endpoints for portfolio overview metrics (Balance, Profit, Return Rate)

post.summary: Add an asset to user's watchlist
Manually trigger the asset sync task

get.summary: Get user's watchlist with optional fuzzy search by symbol or name

get.description: Calculates and returns total balance, total profit/loss, and return rate based on the user's holdings.

get.summary: List user holdings by user ID
Fuzzy search assets globally by symbol or full name (capped at 50 results)

delete.summary: Remove an asset from watchlist by record ID
